reviews.review_text: Hands down the best, as you can tell from all the 5 star reviews here.

Thank you for being so good to me during such a painful process! I had to get my microbladed brows done three times. It’s such a delicate place to get work done. Chris did all my treatments. He is a super nice guy, very easy to talk to, and he made it much more tolerable. The place always looks spotless too. I recommend going here for whatever ink you need to be removed.

My tattoos were a bad decision. Coming to Clean Slate Ink was a great one.
Super friendly and extremely professional they took care to listen and answer my questions without judgment. Impeccably clean, professional, and attentive!
If you have a tattoo you regret, they are the best choice in Central Texas to remove it.

Christopher Harris, the owner, put me at ease and answered all my questions. He is friendly and goes out of the way to make sure you understand the procedure and what to expect. Great facility, good guy, big heart.

I had a great experience for my first consultation and first treatment. He was very knowledgeable. Explained the process and what expectations I should have. The facility is very clean and quiet. Clean bathrooms. I'll update this later with how the removal is going, but he told me because my tattoo is older it may take only 5 to 7 treatments, which is less than I had expected.
Friendly service and I'm seeing great results! I'm thankful to have a removal clinic so close to home with many convenient appointment times to choose from.
Chris is amazing!! Answers all your questions about the process and makes you feel comfortable with everything before, during, and afterwards!! 10/10 recommend!
"My microblading removal experience was fantastic here. It was affordable and incredibly effective. Surely going for second session .Highly recommend

Chris was on-time when I arrived for my appt. He promptly evaluated and offered professional opinions. I liked how he was able to explain the process in details. I was very happy with his work. Highly recommended !
Clean and professional space, great explanation of the procedure, no surprises throughout the process. Had a great experience!

Extremely professional and caring place. Everything was discussed and reiterated re the process, aftercare and throughout the treatment. Felt very comfortable and there is a. friendly atmosphere. Extremely happy I chose this facility to help with my tattoo removal.
Clean, friendly, quick service, informative.

This is my third appointment and every time it's been a great experience. Chris is so chill and super kind and does his very best to give you the easiest experience. Laser removal isn't pain free but he definitely does his best to make it quick and comfortable for you. And the my tattoo lightened so much in just the 2nd session. Super excited!

Great experience everytime. Super informative and I always leave feeling reassured. Results are showing!
Stay consistent and you will get your dream results at clean slate.
Had a great experience with Chris at clean slate ink, first treatment of laser tattoo removal and I’m very thankful to have found Chris. Very professional and a comfortable atmosphere!
Really nice atmosphere. Chris was very knowledgeable and put my nerves at ease. Quick and easy. I highly recommend Clean Slate Ink.
Absolutely upfront and transparent about the process and prices. Checked up on me to make sure the healing process was going well. Feel very confident with this journey with Clean Slate Ink
Chris is great; he is knowledgeable and he explained the process very well. The space is lovely and very clean.

I started going to clean slate ink a few years ago and have been a repeat client. I’ve had several sessions with both Chris and Lana and the level of professionalism and knowledge about services they provide is top notch. I am extremely impressed with the laser tattoo and hair removal services I’ve received and would highly recommend this place to anyone who is currently looking for tattoo or hair removal services.

As a cosmetic tattoo artist in Austin , I have sent numerous women to Clean Slate Ink for eyebrow tattoo removal as a first step in my process.  After seeing so many positive results over the years, I recently decided to become a client myself (to address both a back and ankle tattoo that I have  been unhappy with for awhile).  I wish I had started the process sooner! Chris and his team are super professional, knowledgeable, and make you feel relaxed/comfortable the entire time. Not to mention their state of the art lasers and great pricing.  I wouldn’t recommend anyone else for laser tattoo removal!!!

Clean Slate Ink is fantastic! I came in to see Carly for laser hair removal. It was quick and easy! She made me feel comfortable and was very pleasant to talk to. I’ll definitely be back! The pricing is the best in town. I highly recommend them!

darker_skin.label: Darker skin tone or Fitzpatrick V-VI mentioned

prior_laser_failed.label: Prior laser treatment mentioned as failed or insufficient

editorial_summary._note: Signal counts use 21 text reviews as extraction base. Editorial summaries reference 22 total reviews for page consistency.
